allow: Bash(node -e "const i = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('storybook-static/index.json','utf8'\)\); const ids = Object.keys\(i.entries\); console.log\(ids.filter\(id => id.includes\('checkbox'\) || id.includes\('toggle'\) || id.includes\('boxselector'\) || id.includes\('modaltabs'\) || id.includes\('journey'\) || id.includes\('boxinput'\) || id.includes\('cta'\)\).sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
